review_title: WEM is a real NoCode platform like none
description: WEM is a game changer for us, now we can bring solutions to our customers like no others, faster, cheaper and more accurate. And maybe the best thing, our customer can ask for changes immediately, thats real agility.
author: Pedro D.
pros: WEM is a real NoCode platform, I know I said the same many times but the most I like is they delivers what it promises, no others do. WEM is an easy to adopt, non intrusive and full featured NoCode platform out of the box.
cons: If I have to say something I will talk about on premise installation, many customers for different reasons needs an on premise environment, pricing on this scenario goes a little far from standard.

review_title: WEM Brings You True Agility And Speed!!!
description: WEM is a true game changer. The speed and agility at which one can develop applications is quite fascinating. We had been very successful in using WEM to complete POC's at a very quick and rapid pace to showcase to the clients.
author: Prithvi P.
pros: 1. Learning curve for the development team. 2. Ease of development. 3. Technical support and service
cons: More out of the box capabilities can be provided but that cannot be classified as a dislike as that falls under the evolution of an tool and increasing its capabilities.

review_title: WEM - simple solution to complex problems. Low-code/No-code.
description: WEM has a potential to solve complex business problems (across domains, across demographics) in a much easier and seamless process.
author: Lakshmikanth Reddy P.
pros: Low-code/No-code. Minimal core coding knowledge required. Even a non techie can start creating an application with ease. Deployment is very simple.
cons: User Interface could be much better. Integrations with other other software/applications needs to be made simple as WEM is competing with other No-code platforms.

review_title: A platform that makes application development innovative and easy
description: WEM is an excellent platform for rapid application development and business process automation. It is a platform that you must use if you are promoting Digital Transformation with fast application and few resources.
author: Ju il C.
pros: The biggest advantage of WEM is that it can quickly respond to changes in end-user requirements and make decisions.The difference from other no-code tools is that UI/UX can be easily created and applied in addition to a set template.And best of all, it's cheaper than other enterprise no-code tools.
cons: It's a pity that it lacks the ability to easily switch to a native mobile app.

description: WEM lets developers create applications quickly, regardless of whether they are consumers or professionals. As WEM becomes more powerful, it implements new technologies every year.
author: Nikita G.
pros: Case Management is the best feature of the WEM, which allows business users, citizens, and developers to capture high-level requirements and work together to create a case life cycle. Agile development enables them to create a new application in a short period of time.
cons: Nothing for now, amazing functionalities
author_profession: Consultant - Microservices @ iauro Systems Pvt Ltd

description: WEM is an outstanding platform for rapid application development and Business process automation. You can quickly build applications without much coding knowledge and you can also seamlessly integrate complex business processes with a simpler approach in fewer steps by using the features it offers.
author: Srikar V.
pros: The ease of development and to immediately see the resultsRapid application developmentReusability, significantly reducing development costs in addition to already low cost developmentThe end user can see the product and suggest the changes which in-turn can be turned around very quickly this will make both the application developer and the consumer happy.
cons: There is a room to add more features for Mobile Application development and they have been periodically enhancing the same.

description: In the banking sector, we once developed an application in 45 minutes. The goal was to build a positive pay application. As we know, the banking sector faces new challenges every single day. They also have to keep up with the competition and comply with laws enacted by government agencies to prevent fraud. Using WEM, we built a Universal Positive Pay application. Having WEM as a partner has been great!
author: Yogesh D.
pros: WEM is a practical, small and agile platform with excellent service. Business users, especially tech-savvy ones, benefit from WEM's flexibility.
cons: It is no code/low code platform and I love coding :(

author: Pranita G.
pros: The platform facilitates reusability, so it does not require you to configure it from scratch. Using WEM, you can quickly build applications without coding; this platform doesn't require you to be an expert in programming. Business process management, time efficiency, and easy customer dealing make it an excellent choice. Wem makes it possible for you to automate tasks that ultimately improve your application’s functionality and efficiency. Using it, an organization can develop faster and save time
cons: Nothing till date as the platform is smooth

author: Sagar N.
pros: The software helps you optimally manage your business processes by offering simple tools and functions for customer focus, new business generation, and increased productivity and performance. Due to our commercial applications, our customers have an improved end-to-end experience. The work is simpler, easier, and a lot more efficient for the team. We have created a banking automation application, which will save us time and will ensure proper security with minimal programming.
cons: No negative comments for the software.It is working smooth.

description: WEM has got lot of functionality and it's extremely easy to build applications. It helped us to create the mobile applications required for our purpose/sector. Highly recommended to all sorts of companies to develop their applications.
author: Biju I.
pros: * Easy to use * Flow chart approach * Cost effective
cons: Haven't come across any cons at this point of time

review_title: Excellent low code platform to accelerate business
author: Krunal C.
pros: An application can be built in a superbly modular way with WEM. Using an interactive modeler, business processes and associated data can be easily modeled. Integration with business services including REST APIs is easy. Reasons to use WEM for application development is it is quick to set up, easy to scale, and easy to expand the skill set, as WEM reduces both development effort and complexity, the time to market is drastically reduced. Overall, it was a very promising and enriching experience.
cons: I haven't come across any cons at this point.

review_title: My experience with WEM is greate
author: Min N.
pros: I liked the all of the features provided in WEM. It was fascinating that the feature is easy-to-understand.
cons: Some nodes are not valid. It would be better to notify users that some nodes were in development process.

author: Bhushan N.
pros: WEM is an incredible platform for business process automation. The simplicity of our approach to complex processes directly results from the amount of out-of-the-box support for almost all the user stories we handle. One of the world's largest companies has turned to us after we have automated processes that require input from dozens of users, often simultaneously, in under a month. There are many features to discover, but the more I use WEM, the more I discover there is one that makes working with the program much simpler and faster.
cons: Trying to figure it out as the platform is smooth in working.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tom R.
pros: Fast results, easy setup, easy learning, great support
cons: Custom Widget development in a custom language without proper documentation

review_title: Great software with a few areas for optimization
description: Our partnership with WEM can already look back on several successful years. We are very satisfied with the software and the regular exchange we have with WEM. We can always expect a quick and reliable response - still, we would hope for an optimization / acceleration in solving roadblocks on their end for the cases when something is not functioning, as we did have to deal with longer waiting times delaying our projects on some occasions. For our pricing model, covering citizen development, the pricing of WEM is well suited. In addition, we would be happy to see a suitable licensing model for individual large-scale projects that are to be implemented with the software, which is currently not fittingly being represented in existing pricing models.
author: Johannes D.
pros: - Easy to use software due to well implemented No-Code concept - Wide range on functionality - RPA partnership
cons: - Pricing model could be a bit more differentiated

author: Ankur V.
pros: We don't need to learn coding for development. it's very fast for development.
cons: I like everything regarding this software.

review_title: WEM is the new synonym for Speed
description: Great speed and great product team.
author: Ravi Theja P.
pros: - Speed at which we can implement the product or learn the product - Product support availability and approachability - Visual modelling as part of building POCs or full-end applications
cons: - Can grow to compete with enterprise applications - Can grow to provide ready-made solutions for market to compete with existing COTS products - Can market aggressively to reach out to more customers
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Akeeb S.
pros: It not only allows you to simplify the application and the functionality, but also speed up the whole process.
cons: Sometimes the modeler can be a bit slow to load.

review_title: Excellent no - code platform out there
author: Ishaan L.
pros: Easy to use and understand. The flow chart option available is great. Very flexible and customer support was very helpful
cons: No issues faced by me as of now. Really happy with the workings of the software

review_title: WEM No Code : A good fit in today’s scenario
author: Deepak V.
pros: It was simple to use. Even a inexperienced person can use it
cons: Price is a bit high for the mid tier segment

review_title: WEM - Indeed a Low Code Platform
description: Very good. Able to sell , able to build fast , Able to build skill capacity easily. Overall very enriching and promising experience
author: Bindu S.
pros: With WEM solution build is real quick. TO build skilled staff in WEM is also easy unlike a lot other low code platforms where the developer /design community is super expensive.
cons: Can have better reporting features UI reusability needs enhancement

author: Ashitosh D.
pros: "Simply superb! Fast, Flexible, Futuristic ..."
cons: Sometimes the modeler can be a bit slow to load.

author: Tin T.
pros: Very friendly user product and offers a great range of ready made functions to use in order to create your own application
cons: Would be great if the product offer trainings in more languages

description: The modeler just is superb way to abstract the business process and data generated out of it.
author: Priya P.
pros: Easy to use. Cost effective.It not only allows you to simplify the application and the functionality, but also speed up the whole process.
cons: Haven't come across any cons at this point of time.

author: Anjali G.
pros: Cost effective User friendly Less time and efforts
cons: Haven't come across any cons Yet. Its good to go for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
